description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, compact body with a glossy dark finish and a classic, rounded silhouette. The vehicle has two main passenger doors, a prominent front grille, and a slightly raised trunk lid, which is open in these views. The headlights and taillights are small and circular, with chrome accents visible on the front grille and around the windows. The wheels are partially covered by fenders, and the exhaust pipes are visible at the rear. The interior appears to have light-colored seats and a simple dashboard, typical of vintage coupe designs.
description: A glossy, dark-colored vintage coupe car with a rounded body, two doors, and an open trunk, featuring chrome accents and partially covered wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the coupe's two doors, open trunk, and light interior seats.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open trunk, dual exhaust pipes, and round taillights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the open trunk and side profile.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the chrome grille, round headlights, and curved hood.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
